title: tengine.shadergen.screenshot v1
description: A screenshot was captured to disk. Producer: tengine silo_tester via the registry handle SHADERGEN_SCREENSHOT in crates/tengine-dgc-hal/src/silo/shadergen_handlers/event_registry.rs. CloudEvents subject is 'frame_{frame:04}' for stable sort order. Consumers can read 'path' directly; the file is durably flushed before this event fires.

label.description: screenshot label as passed to the screenshot command (e.g. 'shadergen', 'pre_race')

frame.description: GPU frame index at which the screenshot was captured

path.description: absolute path to the PNG file under the session-dir's artifacts/ subtree

bytes.description: on-disk size of the screenshot in bytes
